records.m_Talk_ENG: Th-the city disappeared.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Th-the city disappeared.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Th-the city disappeared.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Did she really stop that C.O. somehow?
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Did she really stop that C.O. somehow?
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Did she really stop that C.O. somehow?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It was overwhelming power.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It was overwhelming power.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It was overwhelming power.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If it weren't for her... we wouldn't be alive right now.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If it weren't for her... we wouldn't be alive right now.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If it weren't for her... we wouldn't be alive right now.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ahab! Where are you?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ahab! Where are you?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ahab! Where are you?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I think he fled after seeing that the Estaque's bombardment didn't work.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I think he fled after seeing that the Estaque's bombardment didn't work.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I think he fled after seeing that the Estaque's bombardment didn't work.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That bastard. I should've known when he looked too confident.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That bastard. I should've known when he looked too confident.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That bastard. I should've known when he looked too confident.

records.m_Talk_ENG: He tricked us.
records.m_Talk_DEU: He tricked us.
records.m_Talk_FRA: He tricked us.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You can't trust anyone in Lotus, crap.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You can't trust anyone in Lotus, crap.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You can't trust anyone in Lotus, crap.

records.m_Talk_ENG: H-hey. Sorry about all this. We didn't know either that it'd turn out this way.
records.m_Talk_DEU: H-hey. Sorry about all this. We didn't know either that it'd turn out this way.
records.m_Talk_FRA: H-hey. Sorry about all this. We didn't know either that it'd turn out this way.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's my first time seeing a C.O. like that.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's my first time seeing a C.O. like that.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's my first time seeing a C.O. like that.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And there's nothing we can do when a strong Counter like you can't either...
records.m_Talk_DEU: And there's nothing we can do when a strong Counter like you can't either...
records.m_Talk_FRA: And there's nothing we can do when a strong Counter like you can't either...

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...I knew that it was beyond your capabilities.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...I knew that it was beyond your capabilities.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...I knew that it was beyond your capabilities.

records.m_Talk_ENG: In the end, I wasn't able to kill it this time.
records.m_Talk_DEU: In the end, I wasn't able to kill it this time.
records.m_Talk_FRA: In the end, I wasn't able to kill it this time.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Did Ahab know that the C.O. would come after me?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Did Ahab know that the C.O. would come after me?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Did Ahab know that the C.O. would come after me?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Perhaps that's why he deliberately approached me, who knew Estaque's firepower from the start.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Perhaps that's why he deliberately approached me, who knew Estaque's firepower from the start.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Perhaps that's why he deliberately approached me, who knew Estaque's firepower from the start.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then... does that mean he knows something about me?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then... does that mean he knows something about me?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then... does that mean he knows something about me?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Our greed is what caused this disaster. You and I were fooled by Ahab.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Our greed is what caused this disaster. You and I were fooled by Ahab.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Our greed is what caused this disaster. You and I were fooled by Ahab.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So...
records.m_Talk_DEU: So...
records.m_Talk_FRA: So...

records.m_Talk_ENG: W-we'll go look for that bastard!
records.m_Talk_DEU: W-we'll go look for that bastard!
records.m_Talk_FRA: W-we'll go look for that bastard!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm sure if we search the desert, we'll find traces of him!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm sure if we search the desert, we'll find traces of him!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm sure if we search the desert, we'll find traces of him!

records.m_Talk_ENG: We'll also deal with that whale somehow!
records.m_Talk_DEU: We'll also deal with that whale somehow!
records.m_Talk_FRA: We'll also deal with that whale somehow!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Won't it be better to move as a group than alone?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Won't it be better to move as a group than alone?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Won't it be better to move as a group than alone?

records.m_Talk_ENG: If we spread ourselves and search for him, I'm sure we'll find where he's been! Or at least a pair of his socks!
records.m_Talk_DEU: If we spread ourselves and search for him, I'm sure we'll find where he's been! Or at least a pair of his socks!
records.m_Talk_FRA: If we spread ourselves and search for him, I'm sure we'll find where he's been! Or at least a pair of his socks!

records.m_Talk_ENG: S-so, please don't kill us! Since you're the strongest out of us, we'll do as you say!
records.m_Talk_DEU: S-so, please don't kill us! Since you're the strongest out of us, we'll do as you say!
records.m_Talk_FRA: S-so, please don't kill us! Since you're the strongest out of us, we'll do as you say!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ahab betrayed us. And we almost became prey to a C.O. as a result.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ahab betrayed us. And we almost became prey to a C.O. as a result.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ahab betrayed us. And we almost became prey to a C.O. as a result.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's the Beetles' way that we repay enemies fourfold and favors twofold.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's the Beetles' way that we repay enemies fourfold and favors twofold.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's the Beetles' way that we repay enemies fourfold and favors twofold.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So, we will help you. We will do as you command, as long as it's not an order to die right now.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So, we will help you. We will do as you command, as long as it's not an order to die right now.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So, we will help you. We will do as you command, as long as it's not an order to die right now.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We'll look for Ahab. And... I admit that our gear is not enough to fight that C.O.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We'll look for Ahab. And... I admit that our gear is not enough to fight that C.O.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We'll look for Ahab. And... I admit that our gear is not enough to fight that C.O.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...I don't want to do this, but I'll also request support from the Administration.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...I don't want to do this, but I'll also request support from the Administration.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...I don't want to do this, but I'll also request support from the Administration.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Pick up the casualties and head back to the city.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Pick up the casualties and head back to the city.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Pick up the casualties and head back to the city.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I don't know what you all have been doing until now, but we mustn't let people's lives be sacrificed like this.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I don't know what you all have been doing until now, but we mustn't let people's lives be sacrificed like this.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I don't know what you all have been doing until now, but we mustn't let people's lives be sacrificed like this.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I agree with you that the whale must be exterminated. Request support from whomever you trust.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I agree with you that the whale must be exterminated. Request support from whomever you trust.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I agree with you that the whale must be exterminated. Request support from whomever you trust.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I will try to find the C.O. and wait for my chance.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I will try to find the C.O. and wait for my chance.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Also, I expect that you will all come back if you succeed in receiving the Administration's support.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Also, I expect that you will all come back if you succeed in receiving the Administration's support.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Also, I expect that you will all come back if you succeed in receiving the Administration's support.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The thought that I couldn't protect them wreaked havoc in my head.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The thought that I couldn't protect them wreaked havoc in my head.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The thought that I couldn't protect them wreaked havoc in my head.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The hallucinations the C.O. showed me of people dying horrible deaths... Were they my comrades?
records.m_Talk_DEU: The hallucinations the C.O. showed me of people dying horrible deaths... Were they my comrades?
records.m_Talk_FRA: The hallucinations the C.O. showed me of people dying horrible deaths... Were they my comrades?

records.m_Talk_ENG: When I close my eyes, I hear gunshots and people screaming. Also, comrades dying.
records.m_Talk_DEU: When I close my eyes, I hear gunshots and people screaming. Also, comrades dying.
records.m_Talk_FRA: When I close my eyes, I hear gunshots and people screaming. Also, comrades dying.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But I can't recall any of their faces, voices, or names.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But I can't recall any of their faces, voices, or names.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But I can't recall any of their faces, voices, or names.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Who was I to them?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Who was I to them?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Who was I to them?

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Shadow said that she still needed me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Shadow said that she still needed me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Shadow said that she still needed me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Was the girl also... a comrade that I couldn't save?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Was the girl also... a comrade that I couldn't save?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Was the girl also... a comrade that I couldn't save?

records.m_Talk_ENG: The comrades who resented me in these visions... all because of me...
records.m_Talk_DEU: The comrades who resented me in these visions... all because of me...
records.m_Talk_FRA: The comrades who resented me in these visions... all because of me...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Asha. I couldn't even find her corpse.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Asha. I couldn't even find her corpse.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Asha. I couldn't even find her corpse.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I ruined her hope of wanting to find her missing father.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I ruined her hope of wanting to find her missing father.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I ruined her hope of wanting to find her missing father.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Because of me... Asha is...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Because of me... Asha is...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Because of me... Asha is...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I couldn't protect anything.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I couldn't protect anything.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I couldn't protect anything.

records.m_Talk_ENG: My comrades, my memories, not even the people I needed to protect... Nothing.
records.m_Talk_DEU: My comrades, my memories, not even the people I needed to protect... Nothing.
records.m_Talk_FRA: My comrades, my memories, not even the people I needed to protect... Nothing.
